title: @dr_cintas: This is the most complete AI engineering curriculum on GitHub and it’s 100% free...
rawContent:
Tweet by @dr_cintas (Alvaro Cintas)
Author bio: Educating about AI, Cybersecurity and Technology | Professor | PhD in Computer Science & Engineering
Text: This is the most complete AI engineering curriculum on GitHub and it’s 100% free.

435 lessons. 20 phases, ~320 hours.

The rule that sets it apart: you write backprop, the tokenizer, attention, and the agent loop by hand.

The curriculum covers the full stack:

→ Linear algebra, backprop, tokenizers, attention
→ Agent loops, multi-agent coordination
→ Production infrastructure, AI safety
→ Four languages: Python, TypeScript, Rust, Julia

By the end you have a portfolio of 435 components you understand because you built each one by hand.
